steps.title: Show the triangles are similar
steps.content: Since $AB=AC$, triangle $ABC$ is isosceles, so its base angles are congruent. With the given congruent angles, triangles $BED$ and $CFD$ are similar by angle-angle similarity.

steps.title: Use the side ratio
steps.content:
The point $D$ divides $BC$ so that
$$BD=\frac{5}{9}BC$$
Therefore,
$$CD=\frac{4}{9}BC$$
The corresponding side ratio is
$$\frac{BE}{CF}=\frac{BD}{CD}=\frac{5}{4}$$
